title: Defra international indicator 5 - solid waste and pollution reduced or removed
body: "The Defra international (DI) key performance indicator (KPIs) methodology notes are used to guide programme teams, delivery partners and analysts managing Defra ODA programming in their data collection for DI results. These notes also provide additional background to the annual DI results report.  The reporting templates support in the correct return of the DI KPI data when reporting to Defra ODA Hub.   "
